title: ornithogalum nelsonii
intro: Ornithogalum nelsonii, also known as the Star of Persia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is known for its star-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The medicinal properties of Ornithogalum nelsonii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures.
